case_title: XUN GONG VS. RU HAI LIANG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONG, XUN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIANG, RU HAI (PRINCIPLE)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X]GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY GONG, XUN AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, RU HAI (PRINCIPLE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF XUN GONG APPEARED THROUGH MANDARIN INTERPRETER HWA SHING (SHANNON) KWEI. DEFENDANT RU HAI LIANG APPEARED THROUGH CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-27-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONG, XUN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIANG, RU HAI (PRINCIPLE) PLAINTIFF HAS FILED HIS CLAIM AGAINST THE WRONG PARTY WHO IS AN EMPLOYEE OF THE PEACEFUL TRAINING CENTER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
